title: Automation: Creates board from template, hidden columns lost
excerpt:
Hey, I have created an automation which creates a board from a template. This template has a few hidden columns. These columns are gone in the created board. 
When I manually create a board from the exact same template, …

posts.author: mrmarge (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, I have created an automation which creates a board from a template. This template has a few hidden columns. These columns are gone in the created board.

When I manually create a board from the exact same template, the columns are there.

Any ideas?

Best
Mark

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mrmarge - that shouldn’t be. I would contact support@monday.com to have them look into this. They are quite responsive so you should have someone on it within a couple hours.

Thanks!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: deeobw (Deirdre Ahern)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @mrmarge , did you find a solution to your issue? I’m having the exact same problem. Very frustrating so keen to hear suggestions if you have any, thanks!

posts.author: mrmarge (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @deeobw,

For us it worked to duplicate the automation as well as the template board from which the automation creates a copy.
